Prepare the y argument for a rows_* operation

Source: R/rows_operations.R
prep_rows_y.Rd

Local data frames are converted to an inline query on the same connection as x via dbplyr::copy_inline(). Unlike dplyr's copy = TRUE path, this creates no temporary table and starts no transaction of its own, so rows_* calls work inside with_transaction() (DuckDB does not support nested transactions).

Usage

prep_rows_y(x, y)

Arguments

x

Target lazy table

y

Data frame or lazy table

On this page
